text: im im scotland and my next appointment is not until Dec!!! i will call everyday to see if cancellation. But I would love a nurses appointment, I am on the east, whats the changes of getting an appointment? Happy to travel
is it possible to access MRI records? My NHS app is only for booking routine appointments(cardiff)

Please could you help me - I’ve been told there’s nothing else my Gynaecologist or General Surgeons can do. I have an MRI and recently had a hysterectomy with conservation of ovaries. There were only 2 pics taken as part of my hysterectomy which suggests to me they didn’t look around properly- like mobilising the organs or looking in pouch of Douglas etc. I would really appreciate and help or advice you could offer xxx
